title: Earthy Velvety Brazilian Sweet Potato Bisque
description: A rich and creamy Brazilian-inspired sweet potato soup, featuring Jamaican curry powder and a dairy-free friendly option. Perfect for a romantic dinner or a cozy night in.

ingredients.name: Sweet potatoes (4-5 medium)
ingredients.notes: Choose sweet potatoes with a high starch content for the creamiest bisque

ingredients.name: Jamaican curry powder (1 tsp)
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality curry powder for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Coconut milk (1 can)
ingredients.notes: Full-fat coconut milk for a creamy bisque

ingredients.name: Vegetable broth (4 cups)
ingredients.notes: Use a low-sodium broth for a healthier option

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Pierce the sweet potatoes with a fork several times and bake for 45-60 minutes, or until tender when pierced.
Sauté the onion and garlic in a large saucepan over medium heat until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the Jamaican curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Transfer the roasted sweet potatoes to a blender or food processor with the curry-infused broth.
Blend the mixture until smooth, then return it to the saucepan.
Stir in the coconut milk and cook over low heat until warmed through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the bisque hot, garnished with chopped cilantro and a dollop of coconut cream (optional)
